metadata.description: Curated subset of cached Gemma-Scope layer_12/width_16k SAE detector scores for the iter-3 non-spelling absorption re-analysis (M1 selection-isolation + M2 AUC-difference CIs). Each row carries the precomputed continuous detector scores (unit/anchor/(g)/(h)/dense-probe) and the sparse firing of the eligible (ELIG) latent pool used for RE-k draws.
